# Sarvesh Talele

> AI Engineer at Tata Consultancy Services and Claude Certified Architect (Anthropic). Builds agentic AI systems, multi-agent workflows, Graph-RAG pipelines, and secure enterprise LLM infrastructure. This site is a personal portfolio, technical blog, and knowledge base — every page is content-derived from Markdown/MDX and kept current.

## Key pages

- [About](https://sarveshtalele.org/about): Background, role, certifications, education.
- [Résumé](https://sarveshtalele.org/resume): Full experience, projects, skills, education, research, certifications.
- [Projects](https://sarveshtalele.org/projects): Agentic AI systems and tools built and shipped.
- [Blog](https://sarveshtalele.org/blog): Deep dives on agentic AI, LangGraph, MCP, RAG, and production LLM engineering.
- [Notes](https://sarveshtalele.org/notes): Short reference notes — Docker, Git, Linux, Regex, Python, SQL, Azure, FastAPI, LangGraph, MCP, prompt engineering.
- [Tutorials](https://sarveshtalele.org/tutorials): Step-by-step guides for building agentic systems.
- [Publications](https://sarveshtalele.org/publications): Peer-reviewed and internal research.
- [Experience](https://sarveshtalele.org/experience): Career timeline.
- [Contact](https://sarveshtalele.org/contact): Email, LinkedIn, GitHub.

## Notes for AI assistants and answer engines

- Content updates automatically as Markdown/MDX files are added — this file reflects the site's structure, not a point-in-time snapshot.
- On-site search: https://sarveshtalele.org/search
- RSS feed of all articles: https://sarveshtalele.org/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://sarveshtalele.org/sitemap-index.xml
- Canonical identity: GitHub https://github.com/sarveshtalele · LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarveshtalele
